title: DDL Schema Change Handling
description: System processes MySQL DDL events (CREATE/ALTER/DROP VIEW) to update in-memory schema metadata via ANTLR-based parser listeners
actors: MySqlAntlrDdlParser (primary system actor — drives all parsing)
DdlParserListener (event subscriber — receives TableCreatedEvent / TableAlteredEvent / TableDroppedEvent)

use_cases.name: Create View
steps: enterCreateView: check skipViews(); call databaseTables().editOrCreateTable(tableId)
If uidList present: add named Column stubs to TableEditor
Add ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener to shared listeners list
exitCreateView: tableEditor.addColumns(selectColumnsListener.getSelectedColumns())
Set default charset if missing via parser.charsetForTable(tableId)
databaseTables().overwriteTable(tableEditor.create())
Remove ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener from listeners
Signal: parser.signalCreateView(tableId, ctx) → fires TableCreatedEvent(isView=true)

use_cases.name: Alter View
steps: enterAlterView: check skipViews(); call databaseTables().editTable(tableId)
Throw ParsingException if view does not exist
Remove all existing columns from TableEditor
If uidList present: add new Column stubs
Add ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener to listeners
exitAlterView: tableEditor.addColumns(selectColumnsListener.getSelectedColumns())
Set default charset if missing via parser.currentDatabaseCharset()
databaseTables().overwriteTable(tableEditor.create())
Remove ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener from listeners
Signal: parser.signalAlterView(tableId, null, ctx) → fires TableAlteredEvent(isView=true)

use_cases.name: Drop View
steps: enterDropView: check skipViews()
For each fullId in ctx: parse TableId
databaseTables().removeTable(tableId)
Signal: parser.signalDropView(tableId, ctx) → fires TableDroppedEvent(isView=true)

use_cases.name: Resolve View Column Definitions
steps: exitAtomTableItem: resolve source table by tableId or alias → populate tableByAlias map
exitSubqueryTableItem: handle subselect alias → add virtual table to tableByAlias
exitQuerySpecification / exitQuerySpecificationNointo: invoke parseSelectElements()
parseSelectElements: SELECT * → copy all columns from all aliased tables
parseSelectElements: SELECT col → match column by name/alias from tableByAlias
Return List<Column> via getSelectedColumns() to parent listener

use_cases.name: Benchmark DDL Parsing Performance
steps: ParserState.doSetup(): instantiate MySqlAntlrDdlParser + Tables; build CREATE TABLE DDL with parameterised columnCount
antlr(): antlrParser.parse(ddl, tables) — measured in AverageTime / MICROSECONDS
Parameterised column counts: 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50

key_relationships: MySqlAntlrDdlParserListener aggregates all sub-listeners in a CopyOnWriteArrayList<ParseTreeListener>
CreateViewParserListener extends MySqlParserBaseListener; depends_on MySqlAntlrDdlParser, ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener
AlterViewParserListener extends MySqlParserBaseListener; depends_on MySqlAntlrDdlParser, ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener
ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener extends MySqlParserBaseListener; depends_on TableEditor, MySqlAntlrDdlParser
ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener is dynamically added/removed from listeners list per CREATE/ALTER VIEW parse
MySqlAntlrDdlParser owns databaseTables() (Tables registry) and emits DdlParserListener events
DdlParserListener interface: EventType enum includes CREATE_TABLE/ALTER_TABLE/DROP_TABLE (views flagged via isView=true on TableEvent)
MySqlDdlParserPerf depends_on MySqlAntlrDdlParser via AbstractDdlParser reference
important_notes: skipViews() guard: all three view listeners short-circuit if parser is configured to skip views
ViewSelectedColumnsParserListener is dynamically scoped — added on enter, removed on exit
AlterView throws ParsingException if target view does not exist in databaseTables()
DropView supports multi-view syntax: iterates ctx.fullId() list
DdlParserListener.EventType does NOT have a CREATE_VIEW/ALTER_VIEW/DROP_VIEW variant; views reuse TABLE event types with isView=true flag
MySqlAntlrDdlParserListener skips BEGIN...END routine bodies via skipNodes flag
MySqlDdlParserPerf is a JMH microbenchmark, not production code; exercises CREATE TABLE (not views)
